metadata.title: Wildflour Bakery
metadata.description: Wildflour Bakery is a small-town bakery and event barn in Milltown, NY — come for the bread, stay the weekend, and celebrate in the Bakehouse Loft., Wildflour Bakery is a small-town bakery and event barn in Milltown, NY — come for the bread, stay the weekend, and celebrate in the Bakehouse Loft.

content.markdown:
[0](https://wildflour.example/cart)

Now booking 2028 harvest suppers, retreats and winter gatherings. (Ask about micro-wedding weekends in the Bakehouse Loft, January through March) Inquire [HERE](https://bookings.wildflour.example/party_request/10001)!

# Welcome to Wildflour Bakery

## Slow mornings, warm bread, and rooms that feel like home

Wildflour Bakery began as a village bread counter in Milltown, NY and has grown into three gathering places across the River Valley, each built around a working oven, a long table, and a bed worth lingering in.

[**The Conservatory**](https://wildflour.example/the-conservatory) \- a restored glasshouse on the grounds of the village orchard works, with 12 guest rooms, the original c. 1902 bakehouse, and a 4200 sq ft event hall. Overnight room for up to 26 guests.

[**Stone Barn**](https://wildflour.example/stone-barn), set on 11 acres of meadow and orchard, with a swimming pond, a 2800 sq ft covered patio that seats up to 140 for supper, and rooms that sleep up to 34.

[**Garden and Grove**](https://wildflour.example/garden-and-grove) sits a short walk from the Fernwood village green. Our newest spot hosts up to 120 for dinners and dances and sleeps 16. Ask about micro-wedding weekends, January through March.

Each place has its own character, but Rosa, Theo and the Wildflour crew run all three the same way: bread out of the oven by seven, lights on late, and nobody hurried out the door.

Come see the ovens, walk the orchard rows, stay a night — we would love to bake for your next celebration.

[![The glasshouse aglow after sundown, paper lanterns inside and the orchard dark all around.](https://cdn.wildflour-assets.example/content/v1/489fd4de67c0dc0d7fd83e34/4fbdde8e-a6c7-9370-9661-e7e59d66a8ab/wb-fixture-glasshouse-aglow-at-dusk.jpg)](https://wildflour.example/the-conservatory)

[**The Conservatory**\\
\\
Tucked below Greenhill Ridge, the Conservatory pairs a 2400 sq ft glasshouse with a 1600 sq ft timber barn and 12 guest rooms. Suppers, ceremonies and retreats in every season.](https://wildflour.example/the-conservatory)

[![The Stone Barn parlor: two rush-seat wing chairs around a low oak table stacked with bread books beside a pitcher of dried wheat. Photo by Fern & Field Studio.](https://cdn.wildflour-assets.example/content/v1/489fd4de67c0dc0d7fd83e34/08a705d3-a1d3-8f47-48e9-b88d83980de3/stone-barn-parlor-wing-chairs-oak-table.jpg)](https://wildflour.example/stone-barn)

Fern & Field Studio

[**Stone Barn**\\
\\
Built around the c. 1898 stone bakehouse, Stone Barn offers seven guest cottages and a covered patio for gatherings, ringed by sugar maples and meadow. Rooms open year-round, and friendly dogs may join you.](https://wildflour.example/stone-barn)

[![](https://cdn.wildflour-assets.example/content/v1/489fd4de67c0dc0d7fd83e34/a073bb3e-f1e4-fa61-05ee-c9ba760cb229/bakery-interior-60.jpg)](https://wildflour.example/garden-and-grove)

Fern & Field Studio

[**Garden and Grove wordmark**](https://wildflour.example/garden-and-grove)

Halfway between Greenhill Ridge and the northern hills, Garden and Grove trades rustic for something lighter — pale plaster, oak floors, a kitchen garden out the back door. [Join our mailing list](https://wildflour.example/#footer-sections) and [find us on Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/wildflourbakery/) for word on opening dates and the first suppers.

[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/wildflourbakery/)[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/stayatwildflour)

* * *

Slow mornings, warm bread, and rooms that feel like home.

**The Conservatory**

12 Orchard Lane

Milltown, NY 10101

**Stone Barn Guest House**

85 Stone Barn Rd

Milltown, NY 10101

\*\*\*Stone Barn SEASONAL PARKING NOTE: During sugaring season, late February through March, the gravel lot can get muddy. Overflow parking sits behind the Milltown feed store, a three-minute walk up Stone Barn Rd.\*\*\*

**Garden and Grove**

300 County Road 9

Fernwood, NY

(555) 010-0100
